theme: Bookbinder folding a map without cracking it
title: The Bookbinder's Pocket Fold
strategies: accordion baseline: fold one slot at a time from the left (k=1) until the width fits -- carries every layer, high stress (the checker's baseline)
halve-each-time greedy: always fold at the middle line to shrink fastest -- front-loads thickness by folding the heavy centre early and blindly bends the reinforced spine
thin-margins-first / order search: beam search over fold ORDER that folds light outer flaps first and routes folds around reinforced creases, so the heavy centre is carried as few times as possible
